parameters.name: payload
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'alert', alert_type: 'rate_limit_warning', message: 'LinkedIn API usage at ' + $json.utilization_pct + '% (' + $json.total_actions_today + '/' + $json.daily_limit + ')', severity: 'warning', total_actions_today: $json.total_actions_today, daily_limit: $json.daily_limit, breakdown: $json.breakdown }) }}

nodes.name: Alert OpenClaw
nodes.notes: Sends rate limit alert to OpenClaw inbound hook when >= 80% of daily limit

meta.notes: T064: Rate limit tracker. Runs hourly. Queries n8n execution history API for today's successful linkedin-post, linkedin-comment, and linkedin-like executions. Alerts OpenClaw when usage reaches 80% (120/150) of daily limit.
